title: Tensura: Better Subordinates
description: A mod that lets you train subordinates and teach skills like Poison, Water Current Control, and Self-Regeneration, with a Skills UI tab to toggle abilities, track learning, and monitor mastery, with future updates and suggestions welcome.
body:
# Tensura: Better Subordinates
https://discord.gg/99h7C7NPfk

**Tensura: Better Subordinates** is a growing add-on that allows you to train your subordinates and teach them powerful skills as they progress.

At launch, subordinates can learn abilities such as **Poison**, **Water Current Control**, and **Self-Regeneration**, with many more planned over time.

A new **Skills** tab has been added to the subordinate menu, giving you access to a UI similar to the player skill system.

Inside this menu, you can:
• Toggle your subordinate’s skills on and off  
• Check their learning progress  
• Monitor their mastery progress  

---

## Obtainable Skills for Subordinates

**Strength**  
Reach 4,000 EP and kill X enemies  

**Water Current Control**  
Reach 7,000 EP and spend X time in water  

**Self Regeneration**  
Kill 500 Slimes  

**Corrosion**  
Kill 1 Orc Disaster  

**Paralysis**  
Kill 50 Evil Centipedes  

**Poison**  
Eat 25 Spider Eyes and kill 50 Spiders  

**Steel Strength**  
Reach 20,000 EP and kill X enemies  

**Strengthen Body**  
Reach 20,000 EP and take X total damage  

**Magic Jamming**  
Consume 1× Charybdis Core  

**Ultra Regeneration**  
Consume 1× Charybdis Core  

**Gravity Manipulation**  
Consume 1× Charybdis Core
